title: An Act to Ensure Uniformity in the Regulation of Perfluoroalkyl and Polyfluoroalkyl Substances in Pesticides
last_house_action: 4/17/2025 - The House INSISTED on REFERENCE to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/22/2025 - On motion by Senator PIERCE of Cumberland The Senate INSISTED on REFERENCE to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY suggested and ordered printed. Representative PLUECKER of Warren, MOVED to REFER the Bill to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . On motion of Representative ARATA of New Gloucester, TABLED pending REFERENCE to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . Later today assigned.
Speaker laid before the House Subsequently, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator TALBOT ROSS of Cumberland The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY In NON-CONCURRENCE Sent down for concurrence
The House INSISTED on REFERENCE to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator PIERCE of Cumberland The Senate INSISTED on REFERENCE to the Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
